label: Breakthroughs in Medical Research and Detection

timeline.event: Subtle Brain Blood Flow Changes Linked to Early Alzheimer's
timeline.description: Scientists discovered that subtle changes in blood flow and oxygen use in the brain could enable noninvasive early detection of Alzheimer's.
The novel Pico-C technology allows scientists to view the 3D architecture of DNA in unprecedented detail, offering clues to inflammatory diseases.

timeline.event: Targeted Sodium Channel Drugs Offer Opioid-Free Pain Relief
timeline.description: Advancements in targeted sodium channel drugs are paving the way for effective, non-addictive, opioid-free pain management alternatives.
